raw_transcript: (Post-exam) I see a small posterior fissure and some Grade II internal hemorrhoids. The good news is these are very treatable. I'm prescribing a topical Nitroglycerin ointment to help the fissure heal by increasing blood flow and relaxing the muscle.
final_corrected_note: (Post-exam) I see a small posterior fissure and some Grade II internal hemorrhoids. The good news is these are very treatable. I'm prescribing a topical Nitroglycerin ointment to help the fissure heal by increasing blood flow and relaxing the muscle.
